name: audispd-plugins
title: audispd-plugins
summary: Plugins for the audit event dispatcher
description:
Plugins for the audit event dispatcher
This package provides plugins for the real-time interface to the audit system,
audispd. These plugins can do things like relay events to remote machines or
analyze events for suspicious behavior.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use audisp-remote because Plugins for the audit event dispatcher.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use audisp-remote as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `audisp-remote` as documented upstream for audisp-remote.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair audisp-remote with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `audisp-remote --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Plugins for the audit event dispatcher.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: audisp-remote - plugin for remote logging.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install audit (1:4.1.2-1)
Install with: sudo apt install audit (1:4.1.2-1)
